rawCommits.subject: feat(auth): remove Zero Pro gate from RequireAuth
rawCommits.body:
Remove the is_zero_pro / is_access_granted check that blocked
non-Pro users. Any authenticated user can now access the app.
Backend enforcement is controlled by REQUIRE_ZERO_PRO env var
(set to false on Render to open access).
rawCommits.cleanSubject: remove Zero Pro gate from RequireAuth

rawCommits.subject: feat(auth): re-enable registration with optional invite code
rawCommits.body:
Restore Create Account tab on login screen. Invite code is now
optional — if left blank, a default code is used silently. If
entered, the code is validated against zos-api before submission.
Valid codes capture the inviter user ID for future referral
credit grants. Proxy normalizes zos-api boolean response to
object format. Invite code input sanitized server-side to
prevent path traversal.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: re-enable registration with optional invite code

rawCommits.subject: feat(auth): trigger signup and referral credit grants on registration
rawCommits.body:
After successful registration, fire-and-forget calls to z-billing
to grant signup credits and (if a user-entered invite code was
used) referral credits to both inviter and invitee. Requires
Z_BILLING_API_KEY env var for service-to-service auth. Gracefully
skips if z-billing is unreachable or API key is not configured.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: trigger signup and referral credit grants on registration

rawCommits.subject: refactor(auth): resolve inviter from zos-api finalize, drop zos-api change
rawCommits.body:
Instead of passing inviter_user_id from the frontend, capture it
from the existing zos-api finalize response which already returns
the inviter user object. This eliminates the need for any zos-api
changes. Default invite code check prevents referral grants for
organic signups. Cleaned up unused inviterUserId from frontend
API, store, and form logic.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: resolve inviter from zos-api finalize, drop zos-api change

rawCommits.subject: feat(auth): pass Zero Pro status to z-billing signup grant
rawCommits.body:
Include is_zero_pro from the user session when calling the
z-billing signup-grant endpoint. This allows z-billing to store
the Pro status and use it for daily credit boost calculations.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: pass Zero Pro status to z-billing signup grant

rawCommits.subject: refactor(auth): grant signup credits on first AURA login, not registration
rawCommits.body:
Move signup credit grant from register-only to both login and
register handlers. This ensures credits are granted on first
AURA login regardless of how the account was created (could be
from another ZERO product). Existing users receive credits on
their next login. Idempotent via signup_grant_at check.

Split grant functions into grant_signup_credits and
grant_referral_credits with shared billing_service_config helper.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: grant signup credits on first AURA login, not registration

rawCommits.subject: feat(ui): add Rewards settings section, fix billing plan badge, unify presets
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add Rewards settings section, fix billing plan badge, unify presets

rawCommits.subject: fix(auth): correct zos-api invite path and add Pro boost info to rewards
rawCommits.body:
Fix invite validation and fetch proxy URLs from /api/invite to
/invite (matching zos-api route mount). Add Zero Pro boost info
to referral bonus display in Rewards section so non-Pro users
see the incentive.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: correct zos-api invite path and add Pro boost info to rewards

rawCommits.subject: feat(ui): update Rewards and Billing for new tier system
rawCommits.body:
Update Rewards section to show Mortal tier daily credits (50/day)
and referral bonus (5,000 credits). Replace Zero Pro references
with tier-based upgrade messaging. Update billing plan badge
fallback from 'free' to 'mortal'.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: update Rewards and Billing for new tier system

rawCommits.subject: feat(ui): add tier subscription modal, credits display, billing polish
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add tier subscription modal, credits display, billing polish

rawCommits.subject: fix(auth): use env var for zos-api URL instead of hardcoded value
rawCommits.body:
Read ZOS_API_URL from environment with fallback to the default.
Consistent with the pattern used across the codebase and allows
overriding for local development or staging.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: use env var for zos-api URL instead of hardcoded value

rawCommits.subject: feat(auth): defer referral to subscription, flat 5000, update UI
rawCommits.body:
Pass referred_by to signup grant instead of triggering referral
credits on registration. Referral now fires in z-billing when
the referred user subscribes to a paid plan.

Remove grant_referral_credits function (dead code). Update
Rewards UI and tier modal to show flat 5,000 referral reward
and subscription-triggered messaging.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: defer referral to subscription, flat 5000, update UI

rawCommits.subject: clean up login screen: remove host settings block, update branding
rawCommits.body:
Removed Change Host card, host status badge, and HostSettingsModal
from login view. Updated title from 'Login with ZERO Pro' to
'Login to AURA'. Updated mobile subtitle text.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: clean up login screen: remove host settings block, update branding

rawCommits.subject: set Pro tier price to $10 temporarily for launch
rawCommits.body:
Will revert to $20 after Zero Pro migration is complete.
Stripe STRIPE_PRICE_PRO env var also swapped to legacy price.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: set Pro tier price to $10 temporarily for launch

rawCommits.subject: UI polish: Z credits branding, remove billing email, plan badge styling
rawCommits.body:
Renamed 'credits' to 'Z credits' across billing, rewards, and
buy credits modal. Removed billing email section (users manage
via Stripe portal). Made plan badge text white for visibility.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: UI polish: Z credits branding, remove billing email, plan badge styling

rawCommits.subject: add Z Credit History section to team settings
rawCommits.body:
New nav item showing account summary (balance, plan, status,
monthly allowance, member since) and full transaction history
with type labels, dates, amounts, and running balance.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add Z Credit History section to team settings

rawCommits.subject: show next billing date on billing settings screen
rawCommits.body:
Fetches current_period_end from subscription status endpoint
and displays as 'Next Billing Date' for paid subscribers.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: show next billing date on billing settings screen

rawCommits.subject: reduce rewards description text size to match row labels
rawCommits.cleanSubject: reduce rewards description text size to match row labels

rawCommits.subject: match billing intro text size to credit history intro
rawCommits.cleanSubject: match billing intro text size to credit history intro

rawCommits.subject: redesign invite code as inline clickable element
rawCommits.body:
Moved invite code to right side of row, matching other settings
layout. Click to copy with 'Copied!' feedback. Removed separate
copy button. Fixed width to prevent layout shift.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: redesign invite code as inline clickable element

rawCommits.subject: show billing date row with loading state for paid plans
rawCommits.body:
Row appears immediately for paid plan users with 'Loading...'
while fetching, then shows the date. Hidden for Mortal users.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: show billing date row with loading state for paid plans

rawCommits.subject: show cancellation state in billing UI
rawCommits.body:
Plan description shows 'Cancels at end of period' when cancelled.
Billing date row shows 'Plan Ends' with revert-to-Mortal message
instead of 'Next Billing Date'.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: show cancellation state in billing UI

rawCommits.subject: add proration info text to tier modal, tighten spacing to fit
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add proration info text to tier modal, tighten spacing to fit

rawCommits.subject: add plan loading state, align plan badge and Change Plan button
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add plan loading state, align plan badge and Change Plan button

rawCommits.subject: add loading state to tier modal, prevent Mortal flash
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add loading state to tier modal, prevent Mortal flash

rawCommits.subject: auto-refresh balance and subscription on tab visibility change
rawCommits.body:
When user returns to AURA tab (e.g. after Stripe checkout/portal
in new tab), silently refetch credit balance and subscription
status. No page reload needed.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: auto-refresh balance and subscription on tab visibility change

rawCommits.subject: fix build: add rewards/credit-history to Section type, remove unused billingEmail
rawCommits.cleanSubject: fix build: add rewards/credit-history to Section type, remove unused billingEmail

rawCommits.subject: update e2e smoke tests for login screen without host controls
rawCommits.cleanSubject: update e2e smoke tests for login screen without host controls

rendered.title: Open signups, tiered subscriptions, and a new credits economy
rendered.intro: Today's nightly opens AURA up beyond Zero Pro: any authenticated user can now sign in, registration is back with optional invite codes, and a full tier-based subscription flow ships alongside a new Z credits economy. The login screen and team settings get a sizable cleanup to match.

entries.title: Access opens up: Pro gate removed and registration returns
entries.summary: AURA drops the Zero Pro gate, brings back account creation with optional invite codes, and lays the groundwork for signup and referral credit grants.

items.text: Removed the Zero Pro / access-granted check from RequireAuth so any authenticated user can enter the app, with backend enforcement now controlled by the REQUIRE_ZERO_PRO env var.

Restored the Create Account tab on the login screen with an optional invite code: blank codes silently use a default, entered codes are validated against zos-api and sanitized server-side to prevent path traversal.

Wired up signup and referral credit grants to z-billing, then refactored the flow to grant signup credits on first AURA login (idempotent via signup_grant_at) and resolve the inviter from the existing zos-api finalize response instead of trusting the frontend.

Introduced a new Rewards section in team settings showing your invite code and referral perks, fixed the billing plan badge fallback, unified credit purchase presets, and corrected the zos-api invite proxy path.

entries.title: Tier subscriptions, Stripe portal, and the move to Mortal
entries.summary: A full tier subscription flow lands with a new modal, Stripe checkout and customer portal endpoints, and a switch from Zero Pro framing to the new Mortal-and-up tier system.

items.text: Reframed Rewards and Billing around the new tier system: 50 daily credits and a flat 5,000-credit referral bonus on Mortal, tier-based upgrade messaging in place of Zero Pro references, and the plan badge fallback updated to 'mortal'.
Shipped the TierSubscriptionModal alongside new server endpoints for subscription checkout, Stripe Customer Portal sessions, and subscription status, plus billing UI polish and a credits display.

Deferred referral credits until the invited user actually subscribes to a paid plan: signup grants now carry a referred_by field, the dead grant_referral_credits path is gone, and Rewards/tier copy reflects the subscription-triggered reward.
Made the zos-api URL configurable via ZOS_API_URL with a sensible default, matching the env-var pattern used elsewhere and unblocking local and staging overrides.

entries.title: Login screen cleanup and Z credits in team settings
entries.summary: The login view sheds its host-targeting controls, billing and rewards rebrand to Z credits, and a new Z Credit History section gives users a transparent view of their balance and transactions.

items.text: Cleaned up the login screen by removing the Change Host card, host status badge, and HostSettingsModal, and rebranded the title from 'Login with ZERO Pro' to 'Login to AURA' with refreshed mobile copy.
Set the Pro tier launch price to $10 (with the matching legacy Stripe price), to be reverted to $20 once the Zero Pro migration completes.

Rebranded credits as 'Z credits' across billing, rewards and the buy-credits modal, dropped the redundant billing email row in favor of the Stripe portal, and added a 'Next Billing Date' field driven by current_period_end for paid subscribers.

Added a Z Credit History section to team settings showing balance, plan, status, monthly allowance and a full transaction list, and redesigned the invite code as an inline click-to-copy element with consistent typography across Rewards and Billing.

entries.title: Billing UI states: cancellation, proration, and post-checkout refresh
entries.summary: Billing and subscription surfaces gain proper loading, cancellation and proration states, and AURA now silently refreshes balance and subscription status when users return from Stripe.

items.text: Billing now renders a dedicated row for paid plans with a 'Loading...' placeholder and surfaces cancellation clearly, swapping 'Next Billing Date' for a 'Plan Ends' message that explains the revert to Mortal at period end.

Polished the tier subscription modal with proration explainer copy, tightened spacing, and added a loading state that prevents a brief Mortal flash before the real plan resolves; the billing plan badge and Change Plan button get matching loading alignment.

When the AURA tab regains visibility (for example after a Stripe checkout or portal session in another tab), credit balance and subscription status are silently refetched, removing the need for a manual reload.

Fixed a build break by adding the new rewards and credit-history sections to the settings Section type, dropped the unused billingEmail prop, and updated the core browser smoke test to match the host-control-free login screen.

highlights: Access opened to all authenticated users, Pro gate removed
Registration restored with optional invite codes and referral capture
New tier subscription modal, Stripe portal, and Z credits across billing
Z Credit History and redesigned Rewards section in team settings
